# Inter

Inter is a typeface family by Rasmus Andersson, distributed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1.

- Project: https://rsms.me/inter/
- Source: https://github.com/rsms/inter
- License: https://github.com/rsms/inter/blob/master/LICENSE.txt (SIL OFL 1.1)

Vendored files in this directory are unmodified copies of the upstream `Inter_18pt-Regular.ttf` and `Inter_18pt-Bold.ttf` (optical-size variant tuned for body text). They are used by `app/pdfs/competition_tree_pdf.rb` to render the competition tree PDF with full UTF-8 support (Prawn's built-in fonts cover only Windows-1252).
